Nonprofits must provide their 990 form from the past 2 years and federal determination letter

rows.eligibility: Rent Assistance : People with overdue rent. Must only be 1 month past due. Must reside in a home for 60 days before asking for assistance. Utility Assistance : People with overdue utility bills or disconnection notices for electricity, gas, or water

Once documents are reviewed, casework and eligibility interviews occur by phone. Details on required documents can be found on the website (https://crisisassistance.org/programs/basic-needs/emergency-financial-assistance/#whattobring)
rows.documents: Photo ID, proof of address, Social Security cards for everyone in the household (if registered), proof of household income for the last 30 days including earned income, self-employment, disability or other benefit payments. For Utility Assistance : Past due utility bill or disconnection notice. For Rental Assistance : Copy of lease and past due rent or eviction notice
rows.notes: Site lists address as 500-A Spratt St.

rows.agency: DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES - CASWELL COUNTY

rows.eligibility: Medicaid: Eligibility based on age, pregnancy status, disability status, income, and resources. Must be a US citizen or eligible alien. rows.notes: Site confirms phone 336-694-4141 and M-F 8am-5pm hours.

rows.address: Distributes via partner network; HQ at 437 Dimmocks Mill Rd, Suite #1, Hillsborough, NC 27278

rows.agency: THE COALITION FOR CULTURAL COMPASSION - COMPASSION CLOSET
rows.schedule: Online request form opens 1st of month at 8:00am and 15th at 2:00pm; closes when 35 family requests are received (typically within 30 minutes). Clients may request items every two months.
rows.eligibility: Open to all (no documentation required) - 60-75 families/month
rows.address: Charlotte, NC (delivery-based; no public storefront listed)
rows.notes: Source: culturalcompassion.org, verified 2026-05-03. Confirmed Charlotte-based (operating partner of harvest's NeighborFood Express link, but the program is run by The Coalition for Cultural Compassion locally). Free including delivery. Partner orgs include Atrium Health, Camino Health Center, Church World Service, CMS. Demand exceeds supply - request slots fill within 30 minutes. Especially valuable for undocumented immigrants who hesitate to share personal data. No public phone listed; contact via website form.

rows.address: Old North Durham + Duke Park neighborhoods
rows.notes: Source: onddukeparkfund.org and durhammutualaid.org, verified 2026-05-03. Geographic eligibility — must live in ONDDP zone. No phone — contact via website form.

rows.agency: WAKE CROSSROADS BAPTIST CHURCH - BREAD OF LIFE FOOD PANTRY
rows.eligibility: Open to all
rows.notes: Source: wakecrossroads.com and foodpantries.org, verified 2026-05-03. Address is technically Raleigh 27616 but on the Wake Forest border — many Wake Forest clients can drive there. Email WCRBC@wakecrossroads.com. Including under Wake Forest service area per harvest scope.
